title: Harnessing Opportunities for Productivity Enhancement (HOPE) of Sorghum and Millets in Sub-Saharan Africa and South Asia [HOPE Project: Annual Progress Report for Year 3 (July 2011 – June 2012)]
abstract: The HOPE project has successfully completed its third year of operations. The project implemented all activities scheduled for Year 3, and produced a large number of major planned outputs. While a few outputs targeted for Years 2 and 3 still lag behind, quite a number of outputs scheduled for completion in Year 4 have already been produced by the end of Year 3.
